top_messages.author: spartan_35961
top_messages.content: Pepper is currently negative edge. It’s not a clean mean-reversion asset in this run, so the benchmark is basically ~0 PnL. My current strategy is overtrading it and losing ~25k total. I’m going to widen thresholds, add a no-trade band around fair value, and reduce trading frequency. Osmium I’ll leave unchanged since it’s the only consistent positive contributor

top_messages.author: tribesdev
top_messages.content: keeping a position of 70, and then doing the same thing as osmium, where you buy and sell undervalued/overvalued asks/bids, then market make as well for pepper. I used a regression line on mid to get fair value for pepper
